description: Metabase is an open-source business intelligence and embedded analytics platform for querying data, building dashboards, and exposing analytics to internal teams or end users. It is available self-hosted and as a hosted cloud service, with AI and developer tooling layered on top of the core analytics product.
summary: Metabase exposes a REST API, a separate Agent API, a built-in MCP server, and the npm-distributed `mb` CLI; documented programmatic auth uses Metabase-issued API keys, while MCP auth details were not clearly scrapeable.
